goal: Merged project setup with TypeScript, testing, and lint tooling for the Agent OS project.
constraints: Follow repository guidelines in AGENTS.md and prefer pnpm for package management.
Use recommended settings for Next.js/Node when configuring TypeScript, ESLint, and Prettier.
Keep implementation minimal while ensuring testability

acceptance.then: tests covering runLoop, EpisodeLogger, Replay pass
ESLint and Prettier should be installed as devDependencies without errors

risks: Implementations might deviate from future design expectations
No existing Next.js source may cause ESLint presets to expect files that do not exist yet
rollback: Remove new files and dependencies if approach invalid
Re-run pnpm install after adjusting configuration to resolve tooling conflicts
